task_0	SKIP_COMMITTED	NOOP	branch_2		1	3	14	1	2	task already committed; no recovery work required
task_1	SKIP_COMMITTED	NOOP	branch_2		1	3	14	1	2	task already committed; no recovery work required
task_2	RETRY_FROM_SCRATCH	SUBMIT_FRESH_TASK	branch_2		1	3	4	0	1	restart task from a fresh submission
task_resume	RESUME_FROM_SAVEPOINT	RESUME_FROM_SAVEPOINT	branch_B	before_edit	1	2	7	0	1	resume execution from the latest recorded savepoint
